---
title: "Histoire ecclesiastique"
---

## Histoire ecclesiastique

**Author:** Claude Fleury
**Date:** 1691-1720

### Notes

CMY may have known the book in Newman’s translation, <i>The Ecclesiastical History of M. l\'abbé Fleury, from the Second Ecumenical Council to the end of the Fourth Century</i> (Oxford: Parker 1842-4).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
